heading: Art. 30a. Proceedings conducted before referral
label: 830a Art. 30a. Proceedings conducted before referral
notes: Amendments2019—, substituted “Proceedings conducted before referral” for “Certain proceedings conducted before referral” in section catchline.Pub. L. 116–92, § 531(b)(1)Subsec. (a)(1), (2). , added pars. (1) and (2) and struck out former pars. (1) and (2) which read as follows:Pub. L. 116–92, § 531(a)“(1) Proceedings may be conducted to review, or otherwise act on, the following matters before referral of charges and specifications to court-martial for trial in accordance with regulations prescribed by the President:“(A) Pre-referral investigative subpoenas.“(B) Pre-referral warrants or orders for electronic communications.“(C) Pre-referral matters referred by an appellate court.“(D) Pre-referral matters under subsection (c) or (e) of (article 6b).section 806b of this title“(2) The regulations prescribed under paragraph (1) shall—“(A) include procedures for the review of such rulings that may be ordered under this section as the President considers appropriate; and“(B) provide such limitations on the relief that may be ordered under this section as the President considers appropriate.”2017—Subsec. (a)(1). , inserted “, or otherwise act on,” after “to review” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 115–91, § 531(b)(1)Subsec. (a)(1)(D). , added subpar. (D).Pub. L. 115–91, § 531(b)(2)

children.label: B
children.text: Pre-referral warrants or orders for electronic communications.

children.label: C
children.text: Pre-referral matters referred by an appellate court.

children.label: D
children.text: Pre-referral matters under subsection (c) or (e) of (article 6b).section 806b of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: The mental capacity or mental responsibility of an accused.

children.label: iii
children.text: A request for an individual military counsel.

children.label: A
children.text: set forth the matters that a military judge may rule upon in such proceedings;

children.label: B
children.text: include procedures for the review of such rulings;

children.label: C
children.text: include appropriate limitations to ensure that proceedings under this section extend only to matters that would be subject to consideration by a military judge in a general or special court-martial; and

children.label: D
children.text: provide such limitations on the relief that may be ordered under this section as the President considers appropriate.

If any matter in a proceeding under this section becomes a subject at issue with respect to charges that have been referred to a general or special court-martial, the matter shall be transferred to the military judge detailed to the court-martial.

children.heading: .—Detail of Military Judge
children.label: b .—Detail of Military Judge
children.text: The Secretary concerned shall prescribe regulations providing for the manner in which military judges are detailed to proceedings under subsection (a)(1).

children.heading: .—Discretion to Designate Magistrate to Preside
children.label: c .—Discretion to Designate Magistrate to Preside
children.text: In accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned, a military judge detailed to a proceeding under subsection (a)(1), other than a proceeding described in subparagraph (B) of that subsection, may designate a military magistrate to preside over the proceeding.
